---
title: "Gov 50 Final Project"
author: "Ava Berg"
description: "My final project"
output:
  distill::distill_article:
    self_contained: false
---



## Project thoughts

I am interested in exploring data related to political participation among undergraduate students, possibly comparing in-state and out-of-state. It could be useful to understand voting patterns across neighborhoods in Madison as well, analyzing different wards. I also would be interested in possibly analyzing IMF voting patterns, comparing rotating members and permanent members.
